← All examples

Sub-series

Named blocks of races inside one series, each scored independently — its own standings, discards (the series discard rule applied to the block’s race count), and entrants (a boat with no result other than DNC across a block isn’t an entrant in it). Progressive handicaps chain across block boundaries unchanged.

Examples

#Scenario
1 Sub-series — two blocks, each with its own discards and entrants
2 Sub-series — NHC ratings chain across the block boundary
sailscoring.ie
